column1: Chief Fire Prevention & Mechanical Corp|https://www.chieffire.com/|https://www.bers.nyc.gov/assets/fdny/downloads/pdf/business/approved-companies-commercial-cooking.pdf#page=9-chief-fire-prevention|Westchester / North Jersey|New York City, Westchester County, and Northeast New Jersey commercial kitchens|Esteban Soto|caitlynf@CHIEFFIRE.COM|914-699-3557|Chief Fire's official site advertises range hood and exhaust cleaning, kitchen exhaust cleaning, grease trap cleaning, and service coverage across New York City, Westchester, and Northeast New Jersey, while the current FDNY approved commercial cooking list names Chief Fire Prevention & Mechanical Corp in Elmsford with owner Esteban Soto, caitlynf@CHIEFFIRE.COM, and 914-699-3557.

An Tong Fan Inc.|https://www.nyantong.com/|https://www.bers.nyc.gov/assets/fdny/downloads/pdf/business/approved-companies-commercial-cooking.pdf#page=6-an-tong-fan|Long Island|Long Island and New York City commercial kitchens|Yuanyuan Meng|antongfaninc@gmail.com|347-907-9810|An Tong Fan's official site offers restaurant hood installation, hood repair, and hood cleaning services, says FDNY-certified technicians handle deep cleaning and fire safety checks, and lists Long Island plus New York City service areas, while the current FDNY approved commercial cooking list names An Tong Fan Inc in Woodbury with owner Yuanyuan Meng, antongfaninc@gmail.com, and 347-907-9810.

Chemiclene, Inc.|https://chemiclene.com/|https://www.bers.nyc.gov/assets/fdny/downloads/pdf/business/approved-companies-commercial-cooking.pdf#page=9-chemiclene|North Jersey|North Jersey, New York, Connecticut, and Pennsylvania commercial establishments with kitchen exhaust systems|Andrew Hastings|chemiclene@aol.com|908-862-7799|Chemiclene's official services page lists grease exhaust cleaning and hood cleaning for commercial establishments and says it serves New York and New Jersey from Linden, while the current FDNY approved commercial cooking list names Chemiclene, Inc. in Linden with owner Andrew Hastings, chemiclene@aol.com, and 908-862-7799.
